requirement_topic.en: Photobiological Safety — Blue Light Hazard (AZS/IEC 62471 Risk Groups) under AZSTAND
requirement_topic.zh: 光生物安全——蓝光危害（AZS/IEC 62471 危险组别）依据 AZSTAND
requirement_topic.zht: 光生物安全——藍光危害（AZS/IEC 62471 危險組別）依據 AZSTAND

summary.en: Where photobiological safety is in scope under the AZSTAND conformity regime, LED light sources and luminaires for the Azerbaijan market are assessed using AZS standards that adopt IEC 62471 (photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems), the international basis for deriving the risk group. Risk groups range from RG0 (Exempt — no hazard) to RG3 (High risk), set by blue-light-weighted radiance and irradiance limits. RG2 and RG3 products carry usage restrictions and should be declared in the technical documentation. Unlike the EU, Azerbaijan does not operate an EU-style mandatory energy-label blue-light-class field; the photobiological assessment is handled as part of product safety documentation where the adopted AZS/IEC 62471 framework applies — confirm the current AZSTAND scope for the specific product type.
summary.zh: 在 AZSTAND 合格评定制度下光生物安全属适用范围时，面向阿塞拜疆市场的 LED 光源及灯具采用对接 IEC 62471（灯和灯系统的光生物安全）的 AZS 标准评定，该国际基础用于得出危险组别。危险组别从 RG0（豁免——无危害）至 RG3（高危险），由蓝光加权辐亮度和辐照度限值决定。RG2 及 RG3 产品存在使用限制，应在技术文件中声明。与欧盟不同，阿塞拜疆不实行欧盟式强制能效标签的蓝光等级栏；在采用 AZS/IEC 62471 框架适用时，光生物评估作为产品安全文件的一部分处理——请确认具体产品类型的现行 AZSTAND 范围。
summary.zht: 在 AZSTAND 合格評定制度下光生物安全屬適用範圍時，面向亞塞拜然市場的 LED 光源及燈具採用對接 IEC 62471（燈和燈系統的光生物安全）的 AZS 標準評定，該國際基礎用於得出危險組別。危險組別從 RG0（豁免——無危害）至 RG3（高危險），由藍光加權輻亮度和輻照度限值決定。RG2 及 RG3 產品存在使用限制，應在技術文件中聲明。與歐盟不同，亞塞拜然不實行歐盟式強制能效標籤的藍光等級欄；在採用 AZS/IEC 62471 框架適用時，光生物評估作為產品安全文件的一部分處理——請確認具體產品類型的現行 AZSTAND 範圍。

standards_or_laws: AZSTAND national conformity regime — photobiological safety where in scope for regulated light sources
AZS standards adopting IEC 62471 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (risk group classification)

summary.en: China has adopted GB/T 20145 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems), technically equivalent to IEC 62471. GB/T 20145 is a recommended standard (T = tuijian, recommended) and is not universally mandatory for all LED luminaires in the Chinese market; enforcement and testing obligations are less prescriptive for residential luminaires. Because both Azerbaijan's adopted AZS/IEC 62471 and China's GB/T 20145 share the IEC 62471 base, the technical method for deriving the risk group is the same.
summary.zh: 中国已采用 GB/T 20145（灯和灯系统的光生物安全），技术上等同于 IEC 62471。GB/T 20145 为推荐性标准（T = 推荐），并非对所有中国市场 LED 灯具均为强制要求；对居民灯具的执行及检测义务规定不够严格。由于阿塞拜疆采用的 AZS/IEC 62471 与中国 GB/T 20145 均以 IEC 62471 为基础，得出危险组别的技术方法相同。
summary.zht: 中國已採用 GB/T 20145（燈和燈系統的光生物安全），技術上等同於 IEC 62471。GB/T 20145 為推薦性標準（T = 推薦），並非對所有中國市場 LED 燈具均為強制要求；對居民燈具的執行及檢測義務規定不夠嚴格。由於亞塞拜然採用的 AZS/IEC 62471 與中國 GB/T 20145 均以 IEC 62471 為基礎，得出危險組別的技術方法相同。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20145 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (SAC/SAMR — recommended standard; IEC 62471 base)

gap.en: Both Azerbaijan's adopted AZS/IEC 62471 and China's GB/T 20145 derive from IEC 62471, so the risk-group classification method is the same and a CN IEC 62471-based test report is technically reusable. The substantive gaps are procedural and enforcement-related: (1) GB/T 20145 is recommended-only and not routinely enforced for residential LED luminaires, so a CN-market product may lack a formal risk-group assessment; (2) where AZSTAND conformity brings photobiological safety into scope, a defensible risk-group assessment (commonly via IEC 62471 testing) should be in the technical file; (3) confirm whether IEC/CB-format photobiological reports can be leveraged into AZSTAND conformity and the current scope for the product type. There is no EU-style mandatory blue-light label field in Azerbaijan, so the label-artwork burden of the EU regime does not apply; the obligation is documentation-based.
gap.zh: 阿塞拜疆采用的 AZS/IEC 62471 与中国 GB/T 20145 均源自 IEC 62471，故危险组别分类方法相同，基于 IEC 62471 的中国检测报告在技术上可重用。实质差距为程序及执行层面：（1）GB/T 20145 仅为推荐性标准，对居民 LED 灯具不普遍执行，故中国市场产品可能缺少正式危险组别评估；（2）当 AZSTAND 合格评定将光生物安全纳入范围时，技术文件应包含可辩护的危险组别评估（通常通过 IEC 62471 检测）；（3）需确认 IEC/CB 格式光生物报告能否转用于 AZSTAND 合格评定及该产品类型的现行范围。阿塞拜疆无欧盟式强制蓝光标签栏，故欧盟制度的标签设计负担不适用；该义务以文件为基础。
gap.zht: 亞塞拜然採用的 AZS/IEC 62471 與中國 GB/T 20145 均源自 IEC 62471，故危險組別分類方法相同，基於 IEC 62471 的中國檢測報告在技術上可重用。實質差距為程序及執行層面：（1）GB/T 20145 僅為推薦性標準，對居民 LED 燈具不普遍執行，故中國市場產品可能缺少正式危險組別評估；（2）當 AZSTAND 合格評定將光生物安全納入範圍時，技術文件應包含可辯護的危險組別評估（通常通過 IEC 62471 檢測）；（3）需確認 IEC/CB 格式光生物報告能否轉用於 AZSTAND 合格評定及該產品類型的現行範圍。亞塞拜然無歐盟式強制藍光標籤欄，故歐盟制度的標籤設計負擔不適用；該義務以文件為基礎。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — photobiological risk-group documentation required where in scope under AZSTAND conformity; AZS standards adopting IEC 62471 provide the technical method (confirm current scope for the product type)
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended — GB/T 20145 is a recommended (non-mandatory) standard; enforcement for residential luminaires is not universally prescribed

source.publisher: AZSTAND — State Service for Antimonopoly and Consumer Market Control (Azerbaijan)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Photobiological risk-group classification for LED products entering Azerbaijan is handled, where in scope, under AZSTAND conformity using AZS standards adopting IEC 62471 — the same technical method as China's GB/T 20145. A CN IEC 62471-based report is technically reusable, but GB/T 20145 is recommended-only so a CN-market product may lack a formal assessment. Confirm the current AZSTAND scope and whether IEC/CB-format reports can be leveraged. Azerbaijan has no EU-style mandatory blue-light label field, so the obligation is documentation-based; RG2/RG3 products warrant usage warnings.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入阿塞拜疆的 LED 产品光生物危险组别分类在适用范围内于 AZSTAND 合格评定下处理，采用对接 IEC 62471 的 AZS 标准——与中国 GB/T 20145 技术方法相同。基于 IEC 62471 的中国报告技术上可重用，但 GB/T 20145 仅为推荐性，故中国市场产品可能缺少正式评估。请确认现行 AZSTAND 范围及 IEC/CB 格式报告能否转用。阿塞拜疆无欧盟式强制蓝光标签栏，故该义务以文件为基础；RG2/RG3 产品宜附使用警告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入亞塞拜然的 LED 產品光生物危險組別分類在適用範圍內於 AZSTAND 合格評定下處理，採用對接 IEC 62471 的 AZS 標準——與中國 GB/T 20145 技術方法相同。基於 IEC 62471 的中國報告技術上可重用，但 GB/T 20145 僅為推薦性，故中國市場產品可能缺少正式評估。請確認現行 AZSTAND 範圍及 IEC/CB 格式報告能否轉用。亞塞拜然無歐盟式強制藍光標籤欄，故該義務以文件為基礎；RG2/RG3 產品宜附使用警告。

requirement_topic.en: Product Marking and Consumer Information vs EU Blue-Light Label / China Disclosure
requirement_topic.zh: 产品标志与消费者信息 vs 欧盟蓝光标签 / 中国披露
requirement_topic.zht: 產品標誌與消費者信息 vs 歐盟藍光標籤 / 中國披露

summary.en: Azerbaijan requires product marking and consumer information for regulated lighting products to be consistent with the AZSTAND conformity regime and national consumer-protection rules — including the conformity mark where prescribed, rated electrical data, manufacturer/importer identification, and any safety warnings. Azerbaijan does not operate an EU-style mandatory energy-label layout with a dedicated blue-light-hazard class field; where a photobiological risk group is assessed (see ledaz-photobio-01), the result is documented in the technical file and reflected in warnings for higher risk groups rather than printed as an EU-format label class. In practice, packaging and consumer information are commonly expected in Azerbaijani (and often Russian); confirm current AZSTAND / consumer-protection labelling requirements with the in-country importer.
summary.zh: 阿塞拜疆要求受管制照明产品的标志与消费者信息符合 AZSTAND 合格评定制度及国家消费者保护规则——包括规定的合格标志、额定电气数据、制造商/进口商标识及任何安全警告。阿塞拜疆不实行带专用蓝光危害等级栏的欧盟式强制能效标签版式；在评估光生物危险组别时（见 ledaz-photobio-01），结果记录于技术文件并在较高危险组别中以警告体现，而非作为欧盟版式标签等级印制。实务上，包装及消费者信息通常需以阿塞拜疆语（常加俄语）提供；请向在地进口商确认现行 AZSTAND / 消费者保护标识要求。
summary.zht: 亞塞拜然要求受管制照明產品的標誌與消費者信息符合 AZSTAND 合格評定制度及國家消費者保護規則——包括規定的合格標誌、額定電氣數據、製造商/進口商標識及任何安全警告。亞塞拜然不實行帶專用藍光危害等級欄的歐盟式強制能效標籤版式；在評估光生物危險組別時（見 ledaz-photobio-01），結果記錄於技術文件並在較高危險組別中以警告體現，而非作為歐盟版式標籤等級印製。實務上，包裝及消費者信息通常需以亞塞拜然語（常加俄語）提供；請向在地進口商確認現行 AZSTAND / 消費者保護標識要求。

standards_or_laws: AZSTAND national conformity regime — conformity marking and product information requirements
Azerbaijan consumer-protection rules — packaging / consumer information and language requirements (confirm current text)

summary.en: China's product marking for luminaires follows GB 7000.1 and CCC marking rules, plus the China Energy Label (CEL) under GB 30255 for in-scope products (showing energy grade and lumen output). The China RoHS 2 hazardous-substance disclosure label (SJ/T 11364) is also applied to EEE sold in China. None of these include a blue-light-hazard class equivalent to the EU energy label; CN packaging is in Chinese for the domestic market.
summary.zh: 中国灯具产品标志遵循 GB 7000.1 及 CCC 标志规则，范围内产品另加依据 GB 30255 的中国能效标识（CEL，显示能效等级及光通量）。在中国销售的 EEE 还须贴附中国 RoHS 2 有害物质披露标识（SJ/T 11364）。上述均不含相当于欧盟能效标签的蓝光危害等级；面向国内市场的中国包装为中文。
summary.zht: 中國燈具產品標誌遵循 GB 7000.1 及 CCC 標誌規則，範圍內產品另加依據 GB 30255 的中國能效標識（CEL，顯示能效等級及光通量）。在中國銷售的 EEE 還須貼附中國 RoHS 2 有害物質披露標識（SJ/T 11364）。上述均不含相當於歐盟能效標籤的藍光危害等級；面向國內市場的中國包裝為中文。

standards_or_laws: GB 7000.1 / CNCA-C10-01 — luminaire marking under CCC
GB 30255 — China Energy Label marking for in-scope LED room luminaires
SJ/T 11364-2014 — China RoHS 2 hazardous substance disclosure label

gap.en: Neither Azerbaijan nor China prints an EU-format blue-light-hazard class on the product, so there is no EU-style label-artwork obligation for the Azerbaijan market — a difference from the EU lane. The substantive gaps versus the CN baseline are: (1) the AZSTAND conformity mark (where prescribed) and importer identification replace the Chinese CCC mark / CEL on Azerbaijan-market packaging; (2) consumer information and warnings are commonly expected in Azerbaijani (and often Russian) rather than Chinese; (3) the China Energy Label and China RoHS disclosure label do not transfer to Azerbaijan and should be removed or adapted; (4) any photobiological warnings for RG2/RG3 products should be carried over based on the IEC 62471 assessment. Confirm the exact AZSTAND marking and language requirements with the in-country importer before printing packaging.
gap.zh: 阿塞拜疆与中国均不在产品上印制欧盟版式蓝光危害等级，故阿塞拜疆市场无欧盟式标签设计义务——这与欧盟通道不同。相对中国基线的实质差距为：（1）阿塞拜疆市场包装上以 AZSTAND 合格标志（如有规定）及进口商标识替代中国 CCC 标志/CEL；（2）消费者信息及警告通常需以阿塞拜疆语（常加俄语）而非中文提供；（3）中国能效标识及中国 RoHS 披露标识不转用至阿塞拜疆，应移除或调整；（4）RG2/RG3 产品的任何光生物警告应依 IEC 62471 评估结果保留。印制包装前请向在地进口商确认确切的 AZSTAND 标志及语言要求。
gap.zht: 亞塞拜然與中國均不在產品上印製歐盟版式藍光危害等級，故亞塞拜然市場無歐盟式標籤設計義務——這與歐盟通道不同。相對中國基線的實質差距為：（1）亞塞拜然市場包裝上以 AZSTAND 合格標誌（如有規定）及進口商標識替代中國 CCC 標誌/CEL；（2）消費者信息及警告通常需以亞塞拜然語（常加俄語）而非中文提供；（3）中國能效標識及中國 RoHS 披露標識不轉用至亞塞拜然，應移除或調整；（4）RG2/RG3 產品的任何光生物警告應依 IEC 62471 評估結果保留。印製包裝前請向在地進口商確認確切的 AZSTAND 標誌及語言要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (format differs) — AZSTAND conformity marking, importer identification, and consumer information required; no EU-style blue-light label class — photobiological results carried as warnings/technical-file evidence
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC marking and (for in-scope products) China Energy Label required; China RoHS disclosure label applied; no blue-light class

source.publisher: AZSTAND — State Service for Antimonopoly and Consumer Market Control (Azerbaijan)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For the Azerbaijan market, product marking follows the AZSTAND conformity mark (where prescribed), importer identification, rated data, and consumer information commonly expected in Azerbaijani (often also Russian) — not an EU-format blue-light label class. China's CCC mark, China Energy Label, and China RoHS disclosure label do not transfer and should be removed or adapted. Photobiological warnings for RG2/RG3 products should be carried over from the IEC 62471 assessment. Confirm exact AZSTAND marking and language requirements with the in-country importer before printing packaging.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向阿塞拜疆市场，产品标志遵循 AZSTAND 合格标志（如有规定）、进口商标识、额定数据及通常以阿塞拜疆语（常加俄语）提供的消费者信息——而非欧盟版式蓝光标签等级。中国 CCC 标志、中国能效标识及中国 RoHS 披露标识不转用，应移除或调整。RG2/RG3 产品的光生物警告应依 IEC 62471 评估结果保留。印制包装前请向在地进口商确认确切的 AZSTAND 标志及语言要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向亞塞拜然市場，產品標誌遵循 AZSTAND 合格標誌（如有規定）、進口商標識、額定數據及通常以亞塞拜然語（常加俄語）提供的消費者信息——而非歐盟版式藍光標籤等級。中國 CCC 標誌、中國能效標識及中國 RoHS 披露標識不轉用，應移除或調整。RG2/RG3 產品的光生物警告應依 IEC 62471 評估結果保留。印製包裝前請向在地進口商確認確切的 AZSTAND 標誌及語言要求。
